summary: Comprehensive testing of Weekly Competition System completed successfully. All backend APIs are working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend leaderboard page renders perfectly with countdown timer, winner banner, tab switching, and podium display. Season 2026-W10 is active with 8 test users, past season 2026-W09 archived with MessiGoat as winner. Redis caching operational with 15s TTL. Admin authentication works correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/weekly/status returns current_season_id (2026-W10), season_status (active), ends_in_seconds (455345), total_participants (8), starts_at and ends_at dates
GET /api/weekly/leaderboard returns season_id (2026-W10), users array with CR7_Fan (320 pts) at top, total_participants (8), week_start and week_end dates
GET /api/weekly/summary/2026-W09 returns completed season data with winner MessiGoat (410 pts), top_10 array, total_participants (12), total_predictions (340)
GET /api/weekly/history returns seasons array with 2026-W09 and MessiGoat winner info
GET /api/football/leaderboard/weekly returns season-based weekly leaderboard (backward compatibility) with CR7_Fan at top
GET /api/football/leaderboard returns global leaderboard with CR7_Fan at top (2450 pts)
GET /api/system/metrics returns Redis connected, MongoDB connected
Weekly leaderboard page renders with countdown timer showing 'Season 2026-W10' and days:hours:min:sec format
Previous season winner banner shows 'Last Week's Winner' with MessiGoat and 410 pts
Previous season Top 5 shown in winner banner (MessiGoat, CR7_Fan, Haaland9, MbaKing, SalahKing)
Tab switching between Weekly and Global works correctly
Weekly tab shows podium with CR7_Fan #1 (320 weekly pts), MessiGoat #2, Haaland9 #3
Table shows ranks 4-8 (MbaKing, SalahKing, ViniJr_7, BellinghamJude, PedriMagic) with correct users
Admin login works - POST /api/auth/login with admin@guessit.com / Admin123!
Frontend auto-refresh mechanism implemented (30 second intervals)
Redis caching operational with 15s TTL for weekly leaderboards
MongoDB compound indexes for weekly_user_points implemented (season_id, user_id) and (season_id, weekly_points DESC)
